copilot_dispatch_reason: Scope small enough to verify inline; both edited test files <1100 LOC, source truth files verified against assertions

assertions_verified.spec_document_configs_length_11: correct — 8 canonical md + resource_map + description_metadata + graph_metadata
assertions_verified.spec_document_filenames_size_10: correct — graph-metadata.json is separate GRAPH_METADATA_FILENAME constant

findings.title: Missing negative test for resource-map-backup.md fall-through
findings.description: No test asserts that resource-map-backup.md, my-resource-map.md, or resource-map.txt fall through to generic memory/handler. Regex is strict so runtime safe, but regression coverage gap.

findings.title: memory-types.vitest.ts L114-122 could add resource-map.md semantic example
findings.description: Representative path list at T078 includes plan.md, decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md, research.md but not handover.md or resource-map.md. The list is representative, not exhaustive — not a bug. Adding the entry is a nice-to-have.

findings.title: CONFIGS.length vs FILENAMES.size divergence is intentional
findings.description: SPEC_DOCUMENT_CONFIGS has 11 entries (includes graph_metadata config) but SPEC_DOCUMENT_FILENAMES.size is 10 (graph-metadata.json is exported as separate GRAPH_METADATA_FILENAME constant). Both assertions are correct. Inline comment would aid future maintainers.

recommendations_for_future_packets: Consider a dedicated canonical-filename-negative-cases.vitest.ts to cover all 11 document types against common near-miss filenames (backup/draft/old suffixes)
Export BASENAME_BY_DOCUMENT_TYPE or add a public getter for direct test assertions

questions_answered.q1_complete_consistent_coverage: Yes — both edited files have complete and internally consistent resource_map coverage
questions_answered.q2_configs_length_11_correct: Yes — original was 10, +1 resource_map entry = 11, verified against memory-types.ts source
questions_answered.q3_negative_test_cases_present: No — missing for resource-map-backup.md fall-through (P2, pre-existing gap pattern for other canonical docs)
questions_answered.q4_memory_types_needs_update: No — L114-122 is representative not exhaustive; handover.md already absent without issue; P2 nice-to-have only
questions_answered.q5_thin_continuity_record_adequate: Yes — references resource-map only as a filesystem path fixture, not a canonical doc assertion; no coverage change needed
questions_answered.q6_basename_tests_needed: No — BASENAME_BY_DOCUMENT_TYPE is private; covered indirectly via inferDocumentTypeFromPath round-trips
questions_answered.q7_vitest_run_failures_expected: No — no other test file hardcodes CONFIGS.length or FILENAMES.size; edited files align with source
